TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-24-2014 IN 502, MOTION FOR JUDGMENT NOTHWITHSTANDING THE VERDICT (CCP SEC 629) OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (CCP SEC 663) -DEFENDANT GRANADA'S MOTION FOR PARTIAL JNOV IS GRANTED AS TO THE VERDICT FOR FAILURE TO PREVENT HARASSMENT AND THE VERDICT FOR $55,200 FOR MS. NEUSTEDTER IS SET ASIDE. FURTHER, ANY INCONSISTENCIES WITHIN THE JURY VERDICT (VF-2514) HAVE BEEN RECONCILED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTIONS FOR PARTIAL JNOV ON THE BASIS OF DISCRIMINATION, SEXUAL HARASSMENT, AND RETALIATION ARE DENIED. AS STATED ABOVE, THE SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE DEFENSE VERDICTS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL IS DENIED. UNDER THE APPROPRIATE STANDARD OF REVIEW AND FOR THE REASONS SET FORTH ABOVE, IT WOULD BE INAPPROPRIATE FOR THE COURT TO GRANT PLAINTIFF'S MOTIONS. SEE ORDER ON POST TRIAL MOTIONS FILED 2/4/14 (AJR-502-RG)
